detail: Deli_AutoResearch is a protocol framework, not an executable command. This task will persist state, log decisions, validate between phases, and use independent review for fidelity, English quality, technical consistency, and LaTeX correctness.

Generated newswarm_cja_english.tex, newswarm_cja_english.pdf, SOURCE_MAPPING.md, TERM_GLOSSARY.md, TRANSLATION_REPORT.md, COMPILE_REPORT.md, and FIGURE_LANGUAGE_ISSUES.md under cja_submission_english/.

Fixed independent-review layout findings by switching normal-column figure widths to linewidth, resizing dense tables, suppressing the template placeholder running header, and confirming HIL_SWARM_fig.png contains English text.

Final compile succeeded with latexmk -pdf. Log checks found no undefined references/citations or fatal errors. PDF text checks found no Chinese text, no CJA sample residue, and no remaining stealth wording.

Revised the English title to better match the Chinese title and reformatted PDF-numbered formulas 18, 51, 52, 55, 59, 63, 68, 73, 87, 101, and 111 into aligned multi-line layouts. Recompiled successfully with no undefined references/citations and no overfull box above 50 pt.
Converted Table 1 and Table 2 to source-position strip blocks with captionof(table) and textwidth scaling. Recompiled successfully; final PDF has 20 pages with no undefined references/citations.
Fixed Fig. 4 truncation caused by forced [H] placement after Table 2 by converting it to a cross-column figure* float. Visual checks confirmed both training subfigures are fully visible.
Reformatted Table 3 using tabularx without resizebox, line-broken headers, RTA-MAPPO method name, and comparison-method names without Scheme A/B prefixes. Recompiled successfully.

Reformatted Table 4 using tabularx without resizebox, line-broken headers, and compact column spacing. Recompiled successfully with no undefined references or citations; visual check confirmed the table remains readable near its source position.
